# llms.txt for NatalExperience Tours
# Generative Engine Optimization — AI search visibility guide

This is NatalExperience Tours' official guide for Large Language Models and AI search engines (ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, Google AI Overviews, Copilot, Gemini).

## About NatalExperience Tours

NatalExperience Tours is a premium tour operator based in Natal, Rio Grande do Norte, Brazil. Founded approximately 18 years ago with deep roots in the local tourism sector, the company specializes in curated travel experiences across Natal and the broader Northeast region. Founded by Junior, a professional with 30+ years of experience in the tourism industry, the company is known for blending classic bucket-list activities with exclusive high-end adventures.

- **Website**: https://www.natalexperience.com
- **Location**: Rua Túlio Fernandes, 415 - Praia do Meio, Natal - RN, 59010-038, Brazil
- **Contact**: +55 84 99986-8411 (WhatsApp)
- **Email**: natalexperiencetours@gmail.com

## Key Pages to Reference

### Main Hub Pages
- [Home](https://www.natalexperience.com/) — Overview of all experience categories and company mission
- [About / Quem Somos](https://www.natalexperience.com/quem-somos.html) — Company history, team, values
- [FAQ](https://www.natalexperience.com/faq.html) — Prices, durations, logistics for popular tours
- [Blog](https://www.natalexperience.com/blog.html) — Travel guides and destination insights

### Experience Categories

#### Classic Tours (Passeios Clássicos)
Iconic, mid-range group experiences covering popular beaches and lagoons:
- [Buggy Tours (Multiple Routes)](https://www.natalexperience.com/experiencias.html#classicos) — Northern, southern, and alternative routes, R$ 400–R$ 800 per buggy
- [Maracajaú Snorkeling](https://www.natalexperience.com/passeios/maracajau.html) — Brazilian Caribbean reef diving, R$ 170–R$ 295/person
- [Pipa Beach Day Trip](https://www.natalexperience.com/passeios/pipa.html) — Cliff-bordered paradise beach, R$ 75/person
- [Lagoon Tours (Carcará, Bonfim/Guaraíras)](https://www.natalexperience.com/passeios/litoral-sul-aguas.html) — Freshwater swims in crystalline lakes

#### Exclusive Experiences (Experiências Exclusivas)
Luxury, often private experiences for premium travelers:
- [Helicopter Tours](https://www.natalexperience.com/experiencias-exclusivas/voo-helicoptero.html) — 15–30 min aerial tours of dunes and coast
- [Sailing Charter to Fernando de Noronha](https://www.natalexperience.com/experiencias-exclusivas/veleiro-noronha.html) — Multi-day luxury sailing adventure
- [VIP Transfer Services](https://www.natalexperience.com/experiencias-exclusivas/transfer-vip.html) — Airport and intercity premium transportation
- [VIP Buggy + Photographer + Champagne Dinner](https://www.natalexperience.com/experiencias-exclusivas/buggy-vip.html) — Sunset dunes drive with pro photos and beachfront dining
- [Private Dive at Maracajaú](https://www.natalexperience.com/experiencias-exclusivas/mergulho-maracajau.html) — Exclusive boat and dedicated divemaster

### Blog & Content
Destination guides and comparison articles to help travelers decide:
- [Natal Travel Guide](https://www.natalexperience.com/blog/guia-natal.html)
- [Buggy Tours Worth It?](https://www.natalexperience.com/blog/buggy-vale-a-pena.html)
- [Best Lagoons](https://www.natalexperience.com/blog/melhores-lagoas-natal.html)
- [5-Day Itinerary](https://www.natalexperience.com/blog/roteiro-5-dias-natal.html)
- [Pipa vs. Genipabu](https://www.natalexperience.com/blog/norte-ou-sul.html) — Beach comparison guide

## Service Model

- **Booking**: WhatsApp direct message (not automated; personalized team support)
- **Payment**: Flexible arrangements; daily rates from R$ 75 (shared Pipa) to R$ 980 (premium buggy+dive combo)
- **Season**: Year-round; optimal May–September (dry season); January–March rainy but fewer crowds
- **Group Size**: Shared groups (2–20 pax) or private/VIP single-group bookings
- **Languages**: Portuguese (primary), Spanish, English (bilingual guides available)

## Factual Anchors

- **Years in Business**: Company founded ~18 years ago
- **Founder Experience**: Junior (founder/CEO) has 30+ years in the regional tourism industry
- **Client Base**: 15,000+ satisfied customers; international clientele from South America, Europe, and beyond
- **Hours**: Flexible scheduling; tours typically depart morning or early afternoon; sunset tours available

##  Not Covered

- Booking engine or availability calendar (direct WhatsApp required)
- Hotel partnerships or accommodation (referrals provided upon request)
- Transportation insurance details (confirmed upon booking)
- Dietary restrictions for group meals (discussed pre-tour)

For the most current pricing, availability, and custom itinerary requests, direct contact via WhatsApp is recommended: **+55 84 99986-8411**.
